title: Nether Floating Islands
description: Datapack that creates Nethers with floating island generation, like the old world preset. Featuring all biomes, structures, and floating lava lakes.
body:
# Nether Floating Islands  
Nether Floating Islands is a data pack that seeks to build upon the vanilla floating islands world generation that existed before 1.18, but for the Nether. All biomes and structures exist,  along with floating lava pools (all done with aquifers). 

### Overworld Floating Islands
This pack is meant to be a companion pack for [Revamped Floating Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revamped-floating-islands), which affects the Overworld instead.

## FAQ
1. "Is this compatible with this Data Pack / Mod?"
   - If it changes terrain, no. If it adds biomes, it will be partially compatible (biomes may look weird depending on how they are implemented).

### Check out my new and improved floating island pack, [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands)
